testcase.name: CNNPageTitle

failure.message:
2 visual regressions found. Test failed.
View report: https://screener.io/v2/dashboard/620c18ecf799877d1ab4e245/(default) expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 2 visual regressions found. Test failed.
View report: https://screener.io/v2/dashboard/620c18ecf799877d1ab4e245/(default) expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:94) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:513) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at com.cnn.CNNTest.CNNPageTitle(CNNTest.java:145) at sun.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at sun.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62) at sun.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:498) at org.testng.internal.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:104) at org.testng.internal.Invoker.invokeMethod(Invoker.java:645) at org.testng.internal.Invoker.invokeTestMethod(Invoker.java:851) at org.testng.internal.TestMethodWithDataProviderMethodWorker.call(TestMethodWithDataProviderMethodWorker.java:75) at org.testng.internal.TestMethodWithDataProviderMethodWorker.call(TestMethodWithDataProviderMethodWorker.java:14) at java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:266) at java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:511) at java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:266) at java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1149) at java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:624) at java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:748)

testcase.name: CNNPageTitle
